Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 8 0 0}Wha— Kaz, what are you doing? Why are you wearing a jersey!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 9 0 0}What do you mean "why"? We've got practice after class, remember?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 10 0 0}But we've got to attend the opening ceremony and go to class before all that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 11 0 0}Hurry and head into your classroom so you can change into your normal uniform![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 3 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 12 0 0}What? But I just... Okay, okay, fine. Just quit glaring at me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 13 0 0}So where's the bulletin board with all the class assignments?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 14 0 0}It's literally right there, Kaz! You're in Class F.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 15 0 0}I'm in a different homeroom, so I can't keep an eye on you all the time... You got that!?[n]{f 1 1}
